description: Developed a web-based server and database reporting system using React.js and Elysia.js to generate daily, monthly, and annual server and database reports.
Collaborated with the team to migrate the company's applications from PHP to Javascript to improve application scalability and performance
Collaborated with the team to develop a computer vision-based cattle weight measurement system as a frontend developer.
Collected more than 100 cattle images from the Maribaya Cattle Farm in Brebes, Central Java, as training data for the YOLOv5 model.
